channel.title: General - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: “Beer America” The Series
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In each hour-long episode of Beer America we’ll introduce one of the craft breweries that will be competing at the Great American Beer Festival in September 2012. These breweries will come in all shapes and sizes and from different regions across the United States . We’ll explore the history behind each brewery and introduce the […]

The post “Beer America” The Series first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Real Ale Brewing: Full Moon Pale Rye Ale, Ep. 161
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we tackle the rise of Rye! It seems we are seeing more and more beers using this ingredient that doesn’t actually taste like you think it would when you think of Rye. A great example of that is Real Ale’s Full Moon Rye Pale Ale, a wonderful beer that […]

The post Real Ale Brewing: Full Moon Pale Rye Ale, Ep. 161 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Beer for Breakfast on KDGE 102.1 The Edge Dallas/Fort Worth Radio
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America, we were invited to Beer for Breakfast on Dallas/Fort Worth radio KDGE 102.1 The Edge . Morning show host Vydra tries a new beer each week at 8:10am, but there was one beer no one could get her in the state of Texas, except us of course! They rank beers, […]

The post Beer for Breakfast on KDGE 102.1 The Edge Dallas/Fort Worth Radio first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Beer America TV: The Television Show (Update 9/27)
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America TV was a concept I came up with way back in 2003. The idea was to create a beer travel series highlighting American Craft breweries all over the United States. I thought the concept was gold and even recruited a young, ambitious, and highly creative brewer to be my host and we shot […]

The post Beer America TV: The Television Show (Update 9/27) first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Delay in BATV Vlogs
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
I want to apologize for the delay in posting more beer vlogs! Since moving to Fort Worth Texas, I’ve been extremely busy with my full time paying gig . Before coming here however, we shot a bunch of new beers that I will roll out soon! Behind the scenes, I’ve been continually working on launching […]

The post Delay in BATV Vlogs first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Our own John Pinkerton Featured on SavannahNow.com
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
If you’ve ever wonder what, exactly, a brewmaster does, our John Pinkerton was recently featured on SavannahNow.com . Read the entire article here »

The post Our own John Pinkerton Featured on SavannahNow.com first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: The Hops are Free in Alabama!!!
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Since our post on ABV limits was so popular and seemed to touch a nerve, I wanted to post an email from Tom Cale who has been very kind in keeping us up to date with the situation in Alabama. Thanks so much to all those who contributed to the conversation. Now we need to […]

The post The Hops are Free in Alabama!!! first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: The Alcohol By Volume Argument, Alabama Style
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Great discussion on ABV so far! Thanks to Phil in Mississippi for sharing the above video from YouTube . This is both one of the most unbelievable, disturbing and hysterical pieces we’ve seen to date on this subject, and begs the question, “Where do we live?!?” Pay close attention to Rep. Alvin Holmes comments at […]

The post The Alcohol By Volume Argument, Alabama Style first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
